Container.Name: EasyPXE-Nginx
Container.Overview:
EasyPXE Nginx provides HTTP delivery of iPXE menus, boot files, kernels, initramfs files and ISO images.
It is the HTTP component of the EasyPXE network boot stack and must be installed together with EasyPXE-DNSMasq.
Container.Requires: EasyPXE-DNSMasq must also be installed and running. The configured HTTP port must not already be used by another application on the Unraid server.

Config.Name: Unraid IP
Config.Description: Static LAN IP address of the Unraid server.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: Port used to serve EasyPXE menus, boot files and ISO images.

Config.Name: Nginx Configuration Template
Config.Description: Path to the EasyPXE Nginx configuration template.

Config.Name: EasyPXE HTTP Files
Config.Description: Directory containing boot.ipxe, menus, kernels and other HTTP boot files.

Config.Name: ISO Library
Config.Description: Unraid directory containing ISO images exposed through EasyPXE.
